translations.01KQXQV12C1323QNPSKBQJJ2SZ: 文件夹中的文件过多，无法在文件浏览器中显示。
translations.01KQXQV12B0N0RZ4W4J89HN7RP: 别忘了点击「允许」权限请求，以完成通知设置。
translations.01KQXQV12DRJ0QFV07GAXZ16GN: 通知已关闭，但您随时可以在「设置」中启用通知。
translations.01KQXQV12G9NKGGDD0ZGP0XV2D: 成功！您现在可以接收桌面通知了。
translations.01KQXQV12H94EXZBTCMH5D5STS: 我们不会再显示此横幅，但您随时可以在「设置」中启用通知。
translations.01KQXQV12HZAHWBMD65FA6D9NK: Warp 发送通知的权限被拒绝。
translations.01KQXQV12G7SDZEAP076WZETK2: 此共享对话显示的是您打开时的状态。如果 Agent 仍在运行，请刷新以查看最新进度。
translations.01KRNVK9C8PMWMT06W6KZSNZ0Q: 云端 Agent 启动失败

notes: ai/ambient_agents/task.rs: display_name labels 'GitHub Action'/'Oz Web'/'Warp App' are brand identifiers (enum display labels) -> protocol_key; 'Unknown AmbientAgentSource: {}' -> report_error! -> telemetry; 'Task cancelled'/'Failed to cancel task: {e}' -> DismissibleToast UI -> translate. ai_assistant/panel.rs: all 7 entries flow into AI prompt composition / clipboard transcript / UI warning -> translate (kept 'Warp AI' brand). code/file_tree/view.rs: all 6 are MenuItemFields labels / toast text / view labels -> translate. terminal/alt_screen/alt_screen_element.rs: all 6 are .expect("...") panic messages -> panic_message. terminal/view/inline_banner/notifications_discovery.rs: all 7 are visible banner titles / button text -> translate. terminal/view/shared_session/conversation_ended_tombstone_view.rs: all 9 are visible header/title/metadata UI -> translate (kept 'Agent'/'Warp' brand). uri/mod.rs: lines 885/1135 are toast UI -> translate; lines 133/134/315/318 are safe_info! macro -> telemetry_payload. crates/computer_use/src/windows/screenshot.rs: all 10 entries return Err(format!(...)) / Err('...'.to_string()) propagating to Result<ActionResult, String> -> sink is agent tool-call response / log, not UI -> telemetry_payload. crates/warpui_core/src/elements/formatted_text_element.rs: lines 375/2046 are .expect -> panic_message; lines 1506/1522/1538/1550 build out_of_bound_message logged via log::error! -> telemetry_payload.
